rejection_reason: tone: forbidden_phrase_start — email opens with 'My name is', making the sender the subject of the first sentence. Cold emails must open with something relevant to the recipient, not an introduction about the sender.
text:
Subject: Helping {{company}} save time

Hi {{first_name}},

My name is Alex and I work at FlowAI. I wanted to reach out because I think our platform could really help {{company}}.

FlowAI is a productivity tool that helps busy professionals save 2 hours per day by automating repetitive tasks.

Would you be interested in a quick demo?
